ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "prereg_fullmerit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student pre-registration record. */,
  "prereg_firstname" TEXT /* First name of the student. */,
  "prereg_midname" TEXT /* Middle name of the student. */,
  "prereg_lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the student. */,
  "prereg_bday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student. */,
  "prereg_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student. */,
  "prereg_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student. */,
  "prereg_address" TEXT /* Address of the student. */,
  "prereg_type" TEXT /* Type of pre-registration (e.g., first-time applicant, transfer student, returning student). */,
  "prereg_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student. */,
  "prereg_citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the student. */,
  "prereg_gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student (if applicable). */,
  "prereg_test_scores" TEXT /* Standardized test scores (e.g., SAT, ACT). */,
  "prereg_high_school" TEXT /* Name of the student's high school (for first-time applicants). */,
  "prereg_previous_college" TEXT /* Name of the student's previous college (for transfer students). */,
  "prereg_major_interest" TEXT /* Major interest of the student. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prereg_fullmerit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record. */,
  "prereg_fullmerit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student’s pre-registration ID. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pre-registration (e.g., Submitted, In Review, Completed). */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated. */,
  "prereg_application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., undergraduate, graduate). */,
  "prereg_application_year" INTEGER /* Year of application. */,
  "prereg_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student is applying to. */,
  "prereg_reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrative user who reviewed the application. */,
  "prereg_review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer. */,
  "prereg_documents_submitted" TEXT /* List of documents submitted by the student. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_prereg_fullmerit_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereg_fullmerit_id") REFERENCES students ("prereg_fullmerit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_prereg_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereg_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_prereg_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereg_reviewer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department. */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department. */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the department. */,
  "prereg_department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head. */,
  "prereg_department_website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website. */,
  "prereg_department_phone" TEXT /* Department's contact phone number. */,
  "prereg_department_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account. */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer). */,
  "prereg_user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user. */,
  "prereg_user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user. */,
  "prereg_user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "prereg_user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user. */,
  "prereg_user_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user is associated with. */,
  "prereg_user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_prereg_user_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereg_user_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action. */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user. */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed. */,
  "prereg_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action. */,
  "prereg_action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification. */,
  "prereg_fullmerit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student associated with the notification. */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message. */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent. */,
  "prereg_notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., status update, reminder). */,
  "prereg_notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed). */,
  "prereg_notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_prereg_fullmerit_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereg_fullmerit_id") REFERENCES students ("prereg_fullmerit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry. */,
  "prereg_fullmerit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student providing feedback. */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Feedback comments provided by the student. */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted. */,
  "prereg_feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative). */,
  "prereg_feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the student (e.g., 1 to 5 stars). */,
  "prereg_feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., reviewed, pending). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_prereg_fullmerit_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereg_fullmerit_id") REFERENCES students ("prereg_fullmerit_id")
)
